purpose: Claude-thread file inventory. Every file that has appeared in any Claude conversation associated with this account, indexed by filename. Files are atomic; every deposit was a file before being a deposit. This dataset is the primary discovery layer for archive recovery — strongest surviving artifacts live in this account's conversations.
principle: Files are fixed points. The inventory commits no judgment about which file is canonical for which deposit. Reconciliation against registry.json is a downstream pass.

coverage.walk_status: INITIAL_SEED — covers roughly April 2026 through late June 2026 plus one targeted search into January 2026. Older threads (2024-2025, Pearl-era work) not yet walked.
coverage.method: recent_chats walk descending from 2026-06-23 + targeted conversation_search for 'idp_charter institutional charter'

evidence_levels.1_uploaded_attachment: Original file Lee uploaded to the thread. Likely original deposited bytes.
evidence_levels.2_generated_file: File Claude returned via create_file, artifact, or computer-use output. Possibly the precise deposited artifact if Lee downloaded then uploaded to Zenodo.
evidence_levels.3_pasted_text: Complete textual content pasted into the conversation. Strong textual recovery; bytes/formatting may differ from deposited file.
evidence_levels.4_draft_with_revisions: Multi-turn drafting visible. Deposited state must be identified by curator.
evidence_levels.5_discussion_only: File referenced or discussed but not present in full. Discovery evidence.

filename_patterns_observed.AXN-NNNN.md: Deposit markdown files in data/deposits/ (canonical Alexanarch path)
filename_patterns_observed.EA-*-NN.md: Engagement artifact files (papers, MPAIs, capture registries, specifications)
filename_patterns_observed.EA-WG-CAPTURES-01-vX.X.md: Capture Registry versions (87+ captures by v6.1)
filename_patterns_observed.captures-images-vX.X.zip: Capture image bundles (138 PNGs by v6.1)
filename_patterns_observed.WORKPLAN-*.md: Session workplan files (one per major session)
filename_patterns_observed.registry.json: Alexanarch master registry (compact JSON, 5.3-8.5MB depending on version)
filename_patterns_observed.state.json: Single source of truth for counts
filename_patterns_observed.doi-resolution-index.json: Dead-DOI → live-record mappings (1838 entries by v3.4)
filename_patterns_observed.WGC_BOOK_WORKPLAN_v*.md: Water Giraffe Cycle book project workplan

next_steps_for_continuation: Walk older chats: recent_chats before=2026-04-05T18:05:00Z, paginate backward to 2024 origin
Run targeted conversation_search for each unresolved_work_references entry — identify the filename(s)
Cross-reference inventory entries against data/registry.json — populate associated_axn fields
Identify deposits in registry.json with NO file inventory match → priority Phase 8 (Zenodo salvage) targets
For files at evidence_level 1 (uploaded_attachment) or 2 (generated_file): generate a per-thread retrieval plan that Lee can execute by re-opening the thread

phase_relationship.this_phase: Phase 9 — Claude-thread file inventory and recovery
phase_relationship.priority: PRIMARY — Lee's instruction: 'go through every file in the account first; reconcile against metadata downstream'
phase_relationship.phase_8_relation: Phase 8 (Zenodo file salvage from residential network) remains valid as PARALLEL track for files not found in this account's threads. Files appearing in BOTH a thread and on Zenodo's surviving file serving give the highest recovery confidence (cross-verified bytes).
phase_relationship.phase_7_relation: Phase 7 (aesthetic upgrade) is independent and can finish without coordination with Phases 8 or 9.
